<% local json = require "luci.jsonc" local view = self.fileuni_view or {} local language = view.language or {} local backend = view.backend or {} local labels = backend.labels or {} local language_buttons = language.buttons or {} local host = backend.host or "" local port = backend.port or "19000" local config_path = backend.config_path or "/etc/fileuni/config.toml" local status_text = backend.status_text or "Unknown" local binary_text = backend.binary_text or "Unknown" local backend_hint = backend.backend_hint or ("http://:" .. port .. "/ui") local admin_reset_hint = backend.admin_reset_hint or "" local config_detected_text = backend.config_detected_text or "" %>

<%= pcdata(language.section_title or "Language") %>

<%= pcdata(language.configured_label or "Configured language") %>
<%= pcdata(language.configured_value or "Auto") %>
<%= pcdata(language.effective_label or "Current page language") %>
<%= pcdata(language.effective_value or "English") %>
<% for _, item in ipairs(language_buttons) do %> <%= pcdata(item.label) %> <% end %>

<%= pcdata(language.hint or "") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.section_title or "Backend Access") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.service_status or "Service status") %>
<%= pcdata(status_text) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.cli_binary or "CLI binary") %>
<%= pcdata(binary_text) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.config_file or "Config file") %>
<%= pcdata(config_path) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.detected_backend or "Detected backend") %>
<%= pcdata(backend_hint) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.config_detected or "Config detected") %>
<%= pcdata(config_detected_text) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.open_backend_hint or "") %>

<%= pcdata(admin_reset_hint) %>
